MHIVF Overall Organic Performance Dashboard

Blog vs non blog organic search performance from May 2025 to May 2026 (13 months). Blog URLs are identified by their /blogs/ slug and consolidated separately; all other URLs are segregated into their page groups. Query strings are stripped so each slug is counted once. May 2026 now uses the full actual month report — the earlier run-rate (RR) forecast has been removed.

Priority Optimization View

URL-level table for the selected month range. Each month cell shows New Users, Sessions, Engaged Sessions and Avg Engagement Time. All URLs are shown — no data truncation.

Overall Month-wise Trend

Bar chart reflects the selected metric and the selected month range. May 2026 uses the actual full-month report.

Selected URL Trend

Blog vs Non Blog Monthly Summary

Includes URL field rows for /all-blogs/ and /non-blog-pages/ to keep the summary aligned with the full URL tables. Respects the selected month range.

Month Insight Explorer

Visual Breakdown

Top Movers for Selected Month

Topic Explorer: Month-wise Topic Growth & Drop

This section is separate from the main table filters. Select a month and page group/segment to see topic distribution and growth/drop vs the previous month.

Topics List

Page Group Summary: Month-on-Month View

Includes All Blogs as one page group, alongside doctors, locations, treatment pages, calculators and other non blog groups. Respects the selected month range.

Blog Topic Areas: Detailed View

Clean topic names only, built from URL intent patterns and month-wise traffic movement. Early / recent averages now span all 13 months including the actual May 2026.
